providers.title: Linked Sign-in Providers
providers.notConfiguredHint: This provider is not configured on the server. Contact your administrator.
providers.noneConfigured: No third-party sign-in providers are currently configured by the administrator. You can still sign in with your username and password.
providers.unlinkFailed: Failed to unlink. Please try again.

password.setInitialHint: Setting a password lets you sign in with your username even if you unlink your third-party providers.
password.removeBlockedHint: Link at least one third-party provider before removing your password — otherwise you'd have no way to sign in.
password.removeWarning: You will only be able to sign in via your linked third-party providers. You can set a password again at any time.
password.removed: Password removed. Use a linked provider to sign in next time.
